guide.title: Guide and Help
guide.selectRootHint: Choose your Counter-Strike Global Offensive installation folder
guide.installPackageHint: Install bot improvement plugins and configuration
guide.faqA1: Bot mode modifies gameinfo.gi which VAC secure boot rejects. You must use -insecure.
guide.faqA2: Make sure CS2 is not running, the directory is correct, and the plugin pack is installed. Use the diagnostics panel to check the environment.

faqItems.title: How to choose the right directory
faqItems.body: Select the CS2 game root, usually SteamLibrary\steamapps\common\Counter-Strike Global Offensive. The page will check if game, csgo, MetaMod and CounterStrikeSharp are present.

faqItems.title: How to switch Bot / Online mode
faqItems.body: Use the mode switch on the Config page. Bot Mode for local plugin practice, Online Mode for normal matches. Exit CS2 first to avoid file locks.

faqItems.title: How to add -insecure
faqItems.body: Right-click CS2 in Steam, open Properties, add -insecure to Launch Options. Before going back to online matches, switch back to Online Mode and remove this flag.

faqItems.title: How to play with friends
faqItems.body: Type status in console, find the address after steamid:, prepend connect with a space, and send it to your friend to paste in console.

faqItems.title: How to find demos
faqItems.body: Copy tv_enable 1; tv_autorecord 1 from Config page, play a match, then click Find Recent Demo. The page will show the file, directory, and full path.

faqItems.title: How to uninstall
faqItems.body: Use the Danger Zone at the bottom of this page. Uninstalling will remove addons, plugins, cfg/plugins and MetaMod loaders including all third-party plugin configs. CS2 itself will not be affected.

faqItems.title: What gets cleaned during install
faqItems.body: Each install first completely removes the existing plugin pack and all plugin configs, then installs the built-in package. cfg/autoexec.cfg, game mode configs, overrides, gameinfo.gi and CS2 itself are preserved.

guide.cs2RunningMsg: CS2 is running. Please exit the game before writing.

guide.cs2RunningWarn: CS2 is running. Please exit the game before installing, uninstalling, or switching modes.

guide.installConfirmSub: Old plugins and residual files will be cleaned before installation. CS2 must be exited.
guide.confirmRoot: I have confirmed the directory is correct
guide.uninstallConfirmSub: This action cannot be undone. The existing plugin pack and all plugin configs will be permanently deleted.
guide.uninstallDetail: This will delete addons, plugins, cfg\plugins and MetaMod loader files. The game itself will not be affected.
guide.variantImprovedDesc: AI uses grenades, more aggressive tactics

quickControl.title: Quick Control
quickControl.head: Head
quickControl.oneClickHint: Install plugin pack - Set Bot Mode - Launch CS2
quickControl.description: Mode, difficulty, and launch use desktop native capabilities; Aim, Nades, Knife and Teams copy via Commands.txt.
quickControl.noRootMsg: Select a CS2 root directory on the Guide page first. Quick Control reuses the same directory and installation status.
quickControl.modeBotDetail: Load local plugins for practice. Steam launch option needs -insecure.
quickControl.modeOnlineDetail: Restore normal online play. Removes -insecure after switching.
quickControl.botItemsSkinDetail: Weapon skins, knives and gloves provided by CounterStrikeSharp item plugins.
quickControl.botItemsProfileDetail: Bot avatars and profiles from addons/BotHider.
quickControl.botItemsAgentDetail: Agent models loaded with the plugin pack.
quickControl.botItemsMusicDetail: Music kits loaded with the bot item system.
quickControl.botItemsTip: The current pack includes BotHider, RayTrace, BotHiderImpl, RayTraceImpl and RoundDamageRecap. The assistant handles full-package install and status checking; individual toggles still follow upstream core.json / directory rename conventions.
quickControl.noRootGuide: Please select a CS2 root directory on the Guide page first.
quickControl.envNotReady: The environment is not ready yet. Please complete the installation on the Guide page.
quickControl.cs2RunningMsg: CS2 is running. Please exit the game before writing config.
quickControl.checkPassed: Status check passed. You can switch modes, difficulty, or copy commands.

commands.title: Command Library
commands.description: Filter commands by category, copy them, and paste into the CS2 console or Steam launch options.
commands.pinnedDesc: Frequently used commands for quick access
commands.copyHint: Click any command card to copy.
commands.customEmptyDesc: Save one from the right side, then copy it here.
commands.importFailed: Import failed. Check the file format.
commands.commandNotePlaceholder: Optional, e.g. Quickly restart for training
commands.saveFailed: Failed to save command. Please try again.
commands.teamPresetsDesc: Copy to CT or T side.
commands.noTeamsDesc: Try a different team or player name.
commands.noCommandsDesc: Try a different keyword or switch to another category.

tabs.commonDesc: Most frequently used launch options and match controls.
tabs.botDesc: Bot count, aim, buy, and match restart.
tabs.teamsDesc: 40 pro teams, copy presets to CT or T side.
tabs.weaponsDesc: Copy weapon names and bots will prioritize them next round.

aim.bot_aim_mixed: Default mode. Bots will aim flexibly based on the situation.

nades.bot_nades_off: Bots will not throw any nades.
nades.bot_nades_normal: Default mode. Bots follow normal player-like nade limits.
nades.bot_nades_more: Recommended mode. Same logic as normal but allows more nades.
nades.bot_nades_max: Minimal restrictions. Bots use nades more frequently.

controls.bot_randombuy_1: Let bots buy random weapons. Set to 0 to disable.
controls.bot_quota: Fill the server to the specified number of bots.
controls.mp_restartgame_1: Restart the match while keeping current settings.

startup.insecure: Add to Steam launch options to load local plugins.
startup.disable_workshop: Add to Steam launch options when playing workshop maps.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.hint: Browse skins, cases, and stickers via inventory.cstrike.app.

skin.title: Skin Browser
skin.desc: Browse all weapon skins with filters and preview.

case.title: Case Simulator
case.desc: Simulate opening cases and view all collections.

rename.title: Item Rename
rename.desc: Customize weapon names and description tags.

sync.title: Steam Sync
sync.desc: Sync your Steam inventory for loadout planning.

settings.title: Settings
settings.storageHint: Settings are stored in localStorage. Directory list, theme preferences, and pinned commands will persist after uninstall.
settings.glassOpacityHint: Controls the transparency of glass panels. Higher values are more opaque.
settings.animationSpeedHint: Controls the speed of page transitions and card entrance animations
settings.autostartHint: Disabled by default. When enabled, the assistant will start automatically on Windows login.
settings.autoInstallHint: Enabled by default. Attempts at most once per app version; skips if CS2 is running or no directory is set.
settings.storageLocalStorageDesc: Used to remember your preferences and selected directories, including theme, update log read status, update reminder dismissals, pinned commands, recent commands, recent CS2 directories, hint dismissals, and the first-run auto-install toggle.
settings.storageCs2DirDesc: The plugin pack is installed to the game directory, e.g. game\csgo\addons\counterstrikesharp\... and game\csgo\addons\metamod\...
settings.storagePluginConfigDesc: BotTaunt, NadeSystem and other configs are saved in the CS2 plugin config directory. Each install cleans old packages and configs, then writes the built-in package.
settings.storageLogsDesc: The diagnostics feature provides the log path and can open the log directory. This page only explains the location, it does not modify the log directory.
settings.storageNotice: These local preferences are not uploaded. Plugin configs remain in your selected CS2 directory. Related paths cannot be modified within the program.
settings.openSourceAttribution: Built on the public CS2-Bot-Improver and CS2-Bot-Improver-Plus projects. This assistant is released under AGPL-3.0-or-later.
settings.autostartWebOnly: Web preview environment. Autostart only works in the desktop version.

startupAutomation.checking: Checking if the built-in plugin pack can be auto-installed.
startupAutomation.skippedCs2Running: CS2 is running, auto-install skipped. Close the game and install manually from the setup page.
startupAutomation.skippedNoDir: No CS2 directory detected, auto-install skipped. Select a directory on the setup page first.

launchModal.customArgsHint: Separate multiple arguments with spaces. Auto-saved.
launchModal.cs2Running: CS2 is already running. Please exit before launching.
launchModal.noRoot: Select a CS2 directory before launching directly.

theme.accentHint: Drag the slider to adjust the accent color (0-360 hue)

webOnly.install: Web preview cannot install packages. Target: {path}

webOnly.modeSwitch: Web preview cannot switch mode: {preset}. Target: {path}
webOnly.aiChat: Web preview cannot save AI Chat config. Target: {path}
webOnly.botTaunt: Web preview cannot save taunt text. Target: {path}
webOnly.nadeRecovery: Web preview cannot save nade recovery fire suppression time. Target: {path}
webOnly.commandFile: Web preview cannot read Commands.txt from the built-in resource pack.
webOnly.openDemoDir: Web preview cannot open demo directory. Target: {path}
webOnly.openReplays: Web preview cannot open replays directory. Target: {path}
webOnly.openLogDir: Web preview cannot open log location. Desktop app will open the native log directory.
webOnly.uninstall: Web preview cannot uninstall plugin pack. Target: {path}
webOnly.diagnostics: Web preview has no native runtime logs
webOnly.diagnosticsWebOnly: Web preview can only validate the UI. Install, write, and open directory features require the Tauri desktop environment.
